title: RefinanceSignals
description: Refinance & card-lineup-optimization signals this module OWNS and PROVIDES (FR-CRD-004, umbrella Module 2 Provides list): for each keep/downgrade/cancel/refinance candidate, the LONG-TERM impact on BOTH rewards value (consumed from Rewards CardLineup) and credit score (from CreditFactors/CreditState). Recommend-only — surfaces a trade-off, never executes a downgrade/cancel/refinance (Constitution IV, FR-X-003). All monetary deltas are integer cents; rates are decimal strings; the score impact is qualitative or a bounded estimate, never a fabricated precise figure. Each signal carries Reasoning and a FreshnessStamp; a signal whose money input (annual fee, rewards value) is stale is WITHHELD, not guessed. Consumers: Rewards, Cash Safety, Pay, Bills, Household.

profile_id.description: Owning profile. AuthZ enforced server-side against the validated session identity — never a client-supplied profile_id.

signals.description: One entry per candidate card/account being evaluated. May be empty (no candidates or all inputs stale → see freshness).

subject_account_id.description: The spine account_id / card the signal concerns (cross-referenced to Rewards CardLineup for rewards value).

decision.description: The candidate decision this signal evaluates. Recommend-only — FinOS never executes it.

status.description: withheld when a primary money input (annual fee, rewards value, balance) or credit input was stale/missing — no figure is asserted; the user is asked to refresh. NEVER guess a money input.

annual_fee_delta.description: Signed annual-fee change in cents if the decision is taken (e.g. negative = fee saved on a downgrade). Integer cents. Absent when status='withheld'.

annual_rewards_value_delta.description: Signed change in estimated annual rewards value in cents (sourced from Rewards CardLineup/valuation; negative = rewards lost). Computed in arbitrary precision, rounded half-up once at the cent. Absent when status='withheld'.

net_annual_value_delta.description: annual_rewards_value_delta minus annual_fee_delta effect, integer cents — the headline 'is it worth it on money' figure. Absent when status='withheld'.

estimated_credit_score_impact.description: Qualitative long-term credit-score effect (e.g. cancelling an old card shortens average age → 'minor_decline'/'notable_decline'). Never a fabricated precise point figure; null when not estimable.

utilization_impact.description: Projected aggregate utilization after the decision, decimal-string fraction (cancelling a card lowers total available limit, raising utilization). Sourced via CreditState; null when not applicable.

refinance_rate_apr.description: For decision='refinance': the candidate APR as a decimal-string fraction (e.g. '0.1199' = 11.99%). Sourced + freshness-stamped; null otherwise.

reasoning.description: Inputs + bilingual rationale showing BOTH the rewards-value and credit-score sides of the trade-off (FR-CRD-004, Constitution VI).

freshness.description: Freshness of the most-stale input across signals (oldest governs). Stale money inputs ⇒ affected signals withheld (Constitution VIII).
